name: Leverage
description: Hyperion repeater pistols tighten their aim the longer you keep firing, making them most accurate during sustained trigger holds rather than on the first shot. The Leverage uses a long, high-powered precision barrel, trading fire rate for strong damage and dependable long-range performance. It pairs this with Hyperion's standard medium-to-high capacity magazine, letting you keep shooting for extended bursts.
notes: In Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel, Leverage variants often use Hyperion's newer materials and prefix set, matching Borderlands 2. A related counterpart exists as the Attitude, produced by the older Hyperion line. Because it uses the Jakobs long barrel, it only appears at green rarity or higher. The Leverage is a random drop from any appropriate loot source.
